clusters.theme: Save action has no in-flight feedback
clusters.summary: When the user clicks Save in the Create Segment modal, there is no spinner, disabled state, or progress indicator for the ~3 seconds the request is in flight. The narrator was unsure whether anything was happening.
A first-time user lands on a dashboard that is empty by default with no explanatory copy or call-to-action. The narrator did not know what to do.
The 'segment scope' dropdown in the Create Segment modal has two options and no inline explanation. The narrator could not determine what each option meant.
